How It Works

Book your venue in
three simple steps

No more calling 20 venues, no more vague quotes, no more wasted weekends on venue visits that go nowhere.

🔍
Search & Filter

Enter your city, guest count, budget, and preferred dates. Instantly see venues that match — with real availability shown upfront.

📋
Compare & Shortlist

View detailed venue pages with photos, pricing breakdowns, amenities, capacity, and verified reviews from real couples.

✅
Book with Confidence

Confirm your venue directly on Utsav. Pay a small deposit to lock the date. No middlemen, no spam, no surprises.

Our Story

We built Utsav because
finding a venue
shouldn't be this hard.

India celebrates over 10 million weddings every year. Yet the process of finding the perfect venue is still stuck in the past — WhatsApp forwards, vague quotes, and endless spam calls. We're here to change that.

10M+
Weddings in India each year
₹3.75L Cr
Wedding industry market size
90%
Booked offline or via WhatsApp
0
Platforms with true real-time availability — until now
The Origin

Born from a real frustration.

It started with a simple question: why is booking a wedding venue in India still so painful? Couples spend months navigating a maze of middlemen, unresponsive venues, and platforms that just collect leads and sell them to the highest bidder.

We watched friends and family go through this process — calling dozens of venues, getting callbacks that never came, receiving quotes that changed the moment they showed interest, and ending up with spam on their phones for months.

So we decided to build something better. Utsav is India's first platform that puts the couple in control — with real availability, real prices, and real choice. No phone calls unless you want them. No hidden fees. No surprises.

The Team

Built by people who care deeply about India's celebrations.

We're a small team of builders and event-industry insiders united by one belief: that the most important day of your life deserves a better discovery experience.

👤
Jahanvi Arora
Co-Founder

Jahanvi spent years in India's hospitality and events industry, working with venues and wedding planners across the country. She watched too many couples navigate a broken, opaque system — and decided to fix it.

👤
Varyan Goel
Co-Founder

Varyan is a product builder with a background in marketplace platforms and consumer tech. He believes the best products remove friction invisibly — and leads product and engineering at Utsav.

Want to be part of the Utsav story?

We're looking for early venue partners and couple beta testers across India.

Why Utsav

Not just another lead generator.
We're a booking platform.

🎯
Qualified leads, not spam enquiries
Couples have already filtered by your city, venue type, guest size, and budget. When they contact you, they're genuinely interested.
Higher conversion rates
💰
Zero upfront fees, ever
No listing fee, no subscription, no "featured placement" payment. You only pay a small commission when a booking is confirmed.
Commission on success only
🔒
Full control of your listing
You set your prices, manage your availability, and control exactly what couples see. Update everything in minutes.
Your venue, your rules
⭐
Build real trust with verified reviews
Utsav reviews are linked to confirmed bookings — no anonymous internet reviews. Protects your reputation.
Verified reviews only
📊
Insights into what couples want
See views, searches, and drop-off data. Use analytics to optimise your pricing and presentation.
Free analytics dashboard
🤝
A platform that grows with you
Early partner venues get priority placement, lower commission rates, and dedicated onboarding support.
Early partner benefits
How It Works

Get listed in 4 simple steps.

1
Submit Interest
Fill in the form below with your venue's basic details. Takes less than 5 minutes.
2
Onboarding Call
Our team calls to verify details, answer questions, and walk you through the dashboard.
3
Create Your Profile
Add photos, set pricing, mark availability, and publish your listing.
4
Start Receiving Bookings
Couples book directly. You get notified instantly and confirm within 24 hours.
❋
✿
Our Model

Simple, fair pricing.
No surprises.

We charge nothing upfront — and a small commission only when a booking is confirmed. During our launch period, early partners enjoy a reduced commission rate as our thank you for believing in Utsav first.

✓
₹0 listing fee — free to list, always
✓
₹0 subscription — no monthly charges
✓
Small commission on confirmed bookings only — exact rates shared on onboarding call
✓
6 months zero commission — for venues that join the pre-launch waitlist
✓
Free analytics dashboard — views, enquiries, conversion data
Register Your Venue

Tell us about your venue.
We'll take it from there.

Fill in the form below. Our team will reach out within 48 hours. No commitment required at this stage.
